nasb.text: For out of the heart come evil thoughts, murders, adulteries, fornications, thefts, false witness, slanders.

esv.text: For out of the heart come evil thoughts, murder, adultery, sexual immorality, theft, false witness, slander.

cnv.text: 因為從心裡出來的，有惡念、兇殺、姦淫、淫亂、偷盜、假見證和毀謗。

ccb.text: 因为从心里出来的有恶念、谋杀、通奸、淫乱、偷盗、假见证和毁谤，

csbs.text: 因为从心里发出种种恶念：杀人、通奸、淫乱、偷窃、做伪证、毁谤，
